title: Data Science Intern
description: Assist in building machine learning models for predictive analytics. Perform data cleaning, exploratory data analysis, and feature engineering using Python. Work with pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, and SQL databases. Collaborate with the analytics team to generate business insights.
target_candidates: 3rd year and above, CSE/IT or Data-related branches

title: Machine Learning Intern
description: Develop and train supervised and unsupervised machine learning models. Work on classification and regression problems using TensorFlow or PyTorch. Participate in model evaluation, hyperparameter tuning, and deployment workflows.
target_candidates: Students with strong Python and ML fundamentals

title: AI Research Intern
description: Work on deep learning research projects including computer vision and NLP tasks. Implement CNNs, RNNs, or transformer-based architectures. Analyze research papers and reproduce experiments.
target_candidates: Students interested in AI research and advanced ML

title: Frontend Developer Intern
description: Design and develop responsive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. Improve website usability and performance. Integrate frontend with backend APIs.
target_candidates: Students passionate about web development

title: Backend Developer Intern
description: Develop server-side applications using Python and Flask. Build REST APIs and manage database operations. Work on authentication, routing, and backend architecture.
target_candidates: CSE/IT students interested in backend systems

title: Full Stack Developer Intern
description: Work on full-stack web applications using React for frontend and Node.js or Flask for backend. Design APIs, manage databases, and deploy applications on cloud platforms.
target_candidates: Students with knowledge of frontend and backend development

title: Mobile App Developer Intern
description: Develop Android applications using Kotlin or Java. Integrate Firebase and REST APIs. Test and debug mobile applications to improve performance and user experience.
target_candidates: Students interested in mobile application development

title: DevOps Intern
description: Assist in CI/CD pipeline setup using GitHub Actions or Jenkins. Work with Docker containers and manage deployments on cloud platforms like AWS. Monitor system performance and logs.
target_candidates: Students with Linux and cloud basics

title: Cybersecurity Intern
description: Conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration testing. Analyze network traffic and security logs. Assist in implementing security policies and encryption mechanisms.
target_candidates: Students interested in cybersecurity and ethical hacking

title: Cloud Computing Intern
description: Work with AWS services such as EC2, S3, and Lambda. Deploy applications on cloud infrastructure and monitor usage metrics. Assist in optimizing cloud resource allocation.
target_candidates: Students familiar with cloud fundamentals

title: Data Analyst Intern
description: Perform data cleaning and visualization using Python and Power BI. Create dashboards and generate reports. Use SQL queries to extract and analyze business data.
target_candidates: Students interested in analytics and reporting

title: Business Intelligence Intern
description: Develop interactive dashboards using Tableau or Power BI. Analyze business metrics and support data-driven decision-making. Work closely with cross-functional teams.
target_candidates: Students with analytical and visualization skills

title: Blockchain Intern
description: Develop smart contracts using Solidity. Understand Ethereum blockchain architecture and decentralized applications. Assist in testing and deploying blockchain solutions.
target_candidates: Students interested in blockchain technology

title: IoT Intern
description: Develop IoT prototypes using Arduino or Raspberry Pi. Collect and analyze sensor data. Work on integrating IoT devices with cloud platforms.
target_candidates: Students with embedded systems interest

title: UI/UX Design Intern
description: Design user interfaces using Figma or Adobe XD. Conduct user research and usability testing. Collaborate with frontend developers to improve user experience.
target_candidates: Students interested in design and user experience

title: Software Testing Intern
description: Perform manual and automated testing of web applications. Write test cases and identify bugs. Work with Selenium or other automation tools.
target_candidates: Students interested in QA and testing

title: Embedded Systems Intern
description: Develop firmware for microcontrollers using C/C++. Work on hardware-software integration. Debug and test embedded applications.
target_candidates: ECE or embedded-focused students

title: Game Development Intern
description: Develop 2D/3D games using Unity or Unreal Engine. Implement gameplay mechanics and debug performance issues. Work with C# or C++.
target_candidates: Students interested in game development

title: NLP Intern
description: Build natural language processing models using transformers. Perform text preprocessing, sentiment analysis, and chatbot development. Use Python and HuggingFace libraries.
target_candidates: Students interested in language AI systems

title: Product Management Intern
description: Assist in defining product requirements and writing PRDs. Conduct market research and competitor analysis. Work with engineering and design teams.
target_candidates: Students interested in product strategy and management
